case_title: GOLDEN GATE BRIDGE HIGHWAY & TRANSPORT DISTRICT VS. HURRICANE HAULING

docket_entries.description: ORDER RE: DISMISSAL. CASE SETTLED (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $112.25 SERVED DEC-28-2017, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT HURRICANE HAULING
FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 12/9/2021 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF GOLDEN GATE BRIDGE HIGHWAY & TRANSPORT DISTRICT
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $112.25) SERVED DEC-27-2017, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT AGUILAR, ISAAC

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. CASE SETTLED. PLAINTIFF GOLDEN GATE BRIDGE HIGHWAY & TRANSPORT DISTRICT IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY DEIRDRE BOYE, CLAIMS AJUSTER FOR PLAINTIFF. DEFENDANT HURRICAN HAULING IS NOT PRESENT. PRESENT ON THE DEFENDANT'S BEHALF IS RICHARD SHANNON, MANAGED REPAIR REPRESENTATIVE FOR PROGRESSIVE INSURANCE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MARC SEIDENFELD; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)

AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,483.62 FILED BY GOLDEN GATE BRIDGE HIGHWAY & TRANSPORT DISTRICT AS TO DEFENDANT HURRICANE HAULING AGUILAR, ISAAC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-18-2018 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
